title: Microsoft revamps Copilot structure, elevating former Snap exec as Suleyman shifts to AI models
summary: Microsoft is reorganizing its Copilot organization, unifying its consumer and commercial AI efforts under former Snap executive Jacob Andreou while narrowing the role of Microsoft AI leader Mustafa Suleyman to focus on superintelligence and frontier models. Read More
author: Todd Bishop

title: Google Research at The Check Up: from healthcare innovation to real-world care settings
Improving breast cancer screening workflows with machine learning
AI in Schizophrenia Rehab Uses Risks and Future
summary: Why it matters: AI in Schizophrenia Rehab Uses Risks and Future explores real world tools, privacy challenges and emerging clinical benefits.
author: Sanksshep Mahendra

title: How Attackers Move Through Hybrid Networks After the Initial Breach by Lucie Cardiet
summary: Learn how attackers move laterally across hybrid networks, abusing identity, credentials, and legitimate tools to reach critical systems before launching ransomware or stealing data.

title: NotebookLM Changed Completely: Here's What Matters (in 2026)
summary: ✅ Grab HubSpot’s NotebookLM guide: https://clickhubspot.com/414d85 #NotebookLM just got a massive wave of updates and is now more popular than #Gemini itself. In this full walkthrough, I break down the three-column layout, rank every Studio panel tool into Tier 1 (must-use) and Tier 2 (situational), and share the exact prompt templates and workflows I use to turn raw sources into finished reports, presentations, and social-ready visuals. *TIMESTAMPS* 00:00 NotebookLM Full Tutorial 00:21 NotebookLM’s Core Advantage 02:05 NotebookLM: Sources Panel 05:17 NotebookLM: Chat Panel 07:51 Studio Panel: Tier 1 Tools 08:21 Tool #1: Reports 09:46 Tool #2: Slide Decks 12:53 Tool #3: Infographics 13:56 Tool #4: Mind Maps 15:07 Studio Panel: Tier 2 Tools 15:15 Tool #5: Data Tables 16:09 Tool #6: Video Overviews 17:02 Bonus Tool: Cinematic Video Overviews 17:29 Tool #7: Quiz 17:52 Tool #8: Flashcards 18:28 Tool #9: Audio Overviews 19:14 Lightening Round: NotebookLM Use Cases 19:50 Advanced NotebookLM Workflows *RESOURCES MENTIONED* Prompt Templates: https://www.jeffsu.org/notebooklm-changed-completely-heres-what-matters-in-2026 Workspace Essentials Newsletter: https://www.jeffsu.org/newsletter/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=201 Watch my Gemini tutorial next: https://youtu.be/bTLmt9BKGVc *BUILD A POWERFUL WORKFLOW* 🦾 AI Systems Academy - https://systemsacademy.ai/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=201 📈 The Workspace Academy - https://academy.jeffsu.org/workspace-academy?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=201 ✍️ My Notion Command Center - https://www.pressplay.cc/link/s/DE1C4C50 *BE MY FRIEND:* 📧 Subscribe to my newsletter - https://www.jeffsu.org/newsletter/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=description 📸 Instagram - https://instagram.com/j.sushie 🤝 LinkedIn - https://www.linkedin.com/in/jsu05/ *MY FAVORITE GEAR* 🎬 My YouTube Gear - https://www.jeffsu.org/yt-gear/ 🎒 Everyday Carry -
